function.name: slp_gdelta_process_event
function.description: Process any user turn through the full SIP-GΔ Harness (SIP reduction → FRF quarantine → Δ-Self ledger → HKL/AEF gating). Returns symbolic core, commit status, and KG update.

raw_text.description: Raw natural language input (user turn, document excerpt, etc.)

curvature_score.description: Optional: subjective curvature score (0.0–1.0). >0.75 → FRF quarantine

effort.description: Optional: PAE effort value for AEF/ELQ gating
